/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/X:THE COURT ALSO IMPOSES THE FOLLOWING RELEASE CONDITIONS:/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PARTICIPATE IN OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE ABUSE TREATMENT WHICH MAY BE DONE VIA ZOOM,//X:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA,/RX/WEAP/WS/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT, 20 ON 05-23-22 IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/
